lenses.name: Survival
lenses.question: Does this put the continuity of the organism at risk?

lenses.name: Compounding
lenses.question: Is ORPI smarter after this than before?

lenses.name: Narrative
lenses.question: Does this reinforce or dilute category position?

lenses.name: Inevitability
lenses.question: Does this remove a reason capital could rationally say no?

principles: Discipline is the asset, velocity follows
Memo before code on structural changes
Council reviews what it has not seen; never approves blind
